arts.ttl: Liverpool not for sale amid claims Elon Musk 'interested' in buying club
arts.sum: Liverpool are not for sale and their owners Fenway Sports Group (FSG) have not received any approaches for the club amid links to Elon Musk.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool owners make decision on club’s future amid Elon Musk interest
arts.sum: Liverpool owners Fenway Sports Group have no desire to sell the Merseyside club to Elon Musk amid the Tesla owner’s interest in the Reds. The father of the tech billionaire dropped a bombshell this week in an interview with Times Radio in which he stated that Musk has an interest in acquiring Liverpool – having […] The post Report: Liverpool owners make decision on club’s future amid Elon Musk interest appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool owners insist they have NO intention of selling after Elon Musk's father revealed the billionaire wants to buy the club in bombshell interview
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: In a bombshell admission the tech billionaire's father recently claimed his son would be interested in buying the Merseyside giants from Fenway Sports Group.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister explains why he mocked Lisandro Martinez after Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez and Alexis Mac Allister's relationship as Argentina team-mates was put aside as the former's Manchester United held the latter's Liverpool to a 2-2 draw at Anfield

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott explains how Arne Slot has turned Liverpool into 'actors' on the pitch
arts.sum: Arne Slot has lost just one of his 28 matches in charge of Liverpool and midfielder Harvey Elliott has lifted the lid on the Dutchman's methods on the training ground

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'have gone BACKWARDS' as an attacking team and 'have not been enjoyable to watch,' Jamie Redknapp claims - as Gunners continue to chase Liverpool in Premier League title race
arts.sum: The Gunners are chasing Liverpool in the Premier League title race, currently six points behind the Reds, who have a game in hand, after both sides drew their respective games at the weekend.
